mano_cua.result_summary: Demo页面有5个Datetime Picker示例但无一是time模式+自定义hour/minute-format的组合：Time Picker(index2)无自定义模板，自定义模板(index3)是date模式。mano-cua尝试通过DevTools查找hourFormat/minuteFormat prop但步数耗尽
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The demo page has 5 datetime picker examples: DateTime, Date, Time, Custom Template (date mode with year/month/day format), and Initial Value. None combines time mode with custom hour-format/minute-format. The Time Picker uses plain 00-23/00-59 without custom templates. Could not verify if the feature exists in the component source.
